shortDescription: The former [[DM.Factions[faction_RemembranceCell],Remembrance Cell]] primary research facility on Argondale contains the complete documentation archive of the Armageddon project. Dr. Tilsaye requires direct physical access to the archive terminal to extract the records, as remote access has been deliberately disabled by security protocols. The download process cannot be accelerated without risking data corruption and will require approximately forty minutes of sustained connection time. The local Remembrance Cell forces under Joanna McEvedy's command will respond immediately once their sensors detect activity at the facility location. Primary objective is to defend the facility perimeter and prevent enemy forces from reaching Dr. Tilsaye until the archive extraction is complete. Expected opposition includes heavy assault forces with orders to destroy the archive and eliminate Dr. Tilsaye before she can secure the evidence. The archive contains comprehensive documentation of the Armageddon project from initial conception through current assembly status. If this evidence is lost or destroyed, there will be no independent verification of the project's existence or capabilities beyond witness testimony.
longDescription: We hold the line while Tilsaye pulls the archive. If Joanna's people reach her before the download finishes, there is no record. Just her word against a zealot with an army.

objectiveList.title: Defend Research Facility
objectiveList.description: Defend Targeted Base Structures from Attackers

objectiveList.title: Destroy the Enemy Vanguard
objectiveList.description: Destroy the enemy vanguard force, the first wave.

objectiveList.title: All target buildings must survive
objectiveList.description: Optional objective to keep ALL target structures intact.

objectiveList.title: Await full data extraction
objectiveList.description: Objective for tracking the time left in the mission. While the player it told to Hold Out for Reinforcements

objectiveList.title: Escort Engineer APCs to Base Defenses
objectiveList.description: Escort Engineer APCs to Base Defenses in order to take control of them.

objectiveList.title: Hidden Objective: Destroy the Second Lance
objectiveList.description: Hidden Objective: Destroy the Second Lance

objectiveList.title: Hidden Objective: Destroy the Third Lance
objectiveList.description: Hidden Objective: Destroy the Third Lance

dialogueContent.words: All units to defensive positions. The facility is ours for now, but that situation will change the moment Joanna realizes what we are doing here.
Dr. Tilsaye just arrived at the archive terminal and the download has begun. She needs forty minutes minimum for complete extraction. The system is running nominal so far.
Long-range sensors are detecting movement. Multiple contacts inbound from the northern approach vector. Joanna's forces are already moving to intercept us.
Commander! You have to make sure most of the base stays functional or I will lose access to key systems needed for the data extraction.
We are clear. All hostiles are neutralized or withdrawn. Dr. Tilsaye is secure and the perimeter is stable.
Perfect timing. The full archive is secured and verified. Complete documentation from project inception through current status.
We should not still be standing here when Joanna works out exactly what just left this facility with us. Extract immediately.
We could not hold long enough. Enemy forces are breaching the perimeter and we are taking too much damage to sustain the defense.

The download was interrupted before completion. We need to pull back now before we lose more than just the archive. It is not lost permanently, but Joanna knows we tried and she will reinforce this location.
Turrets are live and tracking! Let's make them regret coming.
New drop signature detected. Multiple contacts inbound. Joanna is committing reinforcements to the engagement.
She is not letting this archive go quietly. We knew she would not. Stay focused and keep them away from the facility interior.
We've got damage on one of the core systems! Don't let them any closer!
We lost a critical system! Data extraction is still going, but has slowed down.
Commander, the data extraction has almost stopped. If we lose another building there won't be any way to get the information out!
We are halfway there, keep protecting the buildings!
The base has some shut down turrets ready to spin online if you can manage to get our engineers to them.
